_instructions: Edit this file on GitHub to update the written content of your media kit. Change text between the quote marks. Don't delete commas, brackets, or quote marks themselves. Save = auto-redeploy in ~60 seconds.

bio.pullQuote: An author and content creator who notices everything about how romance is read, written, adapted, and sold.
bio.paragraph1: She's four books into an eleven-book romance universe, with seven more in active development, and the same audience that reads and comments daily is the one organically demanding the next instalment. That's not a creator monetising an audience. That's a working author with a reader base proven to buy.
bio.paragraph2: Her audience is fandom-native, they read AO3, demanded Heated Rivalry outside Canada, and show up in the comments to defend the hot takes. They watch and convert.

whyPartner.heading: Fandom-native audience
whyPartner.body: Her followers defend, share, demand, and buy. This is the core romance fandom, not casual scrollers.

whyPartner.heading: Algorithmic overperformer
whyPartner.body: Instagram: 1.9M views in 30 days from 51.5K followers. YouTube: 479.5K monthly audience. Reach dramatically outpaces follower count.

whyPartner.heading: Trusted, honest voice
whyPartner.body: She has standards and says so, about tropes, adaptations, literacy, anything in the romance genre. That honesty is exactly why her audience trusts what she recommends.

whyPartner.heading: Multi-format, daily output
whyPartner.body: Daily Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, plus weekly essays and weekly long-forms. One deal, 5+ organic touchpoints.

whyPartner.heading: A working author, not just a commentator
whyPartner.body: Four books published, seven more in active development across an eleven-book universe. The content isn't built on top of someone else's genre — it's built by someone actively writing inside it.

contentRegisters.title: Warm & relatable
contentRegisters.bestFit: Best fit: lifestyle, wellness, bookish, emotional brands.

contentRegisters.title: Sharp & critical
contentRegisters.bestFit: Best fit: tools, platforms, indie-aligned brands.

proofPoints.label: Substack Fiction · global
proofPoints.body: Ranked top 30 within 2 months of launch. Zero paid acquisition, driven entirely by organic social.

proofPoints.label: Reddit Defence
proofPoints.body: When someone tried to cancel her for 'TikTok cringe', Reddit came to her defence. Community loyalty, publicly demonstrated.

proofPoints.label: Readers demanding her trilogy
proofPoints.body: Organic fan demand for the final Lavender Bay book — genuine emotional investment in her fiction.

proofPoints.label: Instagram accounts reached in 30 days
proofPoints.body: Algorithmic reach and content quality, beyond subscriber count.

proofPoints.label: Eleven-book universe in development
proofPoints.body: Four books published, seven more in active development. A sustained creative project.

brandNotFit: Brands misaligned with feminist values or reader trust
Gambling, AI, ethically compromised supply chains

partnershipTypes.d: Brand woven into content naturally: a story beat, not an ad break. Available across any platform or format.
Performance-based. Rachel promotes, audience converts. Trackable, low-risk entry point.
Brand briefs, Rachel creates. Editorial control stays with Rachel, that's what makes it authentic.
Newsletter feature slot. 25.94% open rate - above-industry-average readership.
Highest-alignment category. Publishers, authors, book-adjacent brands.

partnershipClosingLine: Also open to speaking engagements, panel appearances, and digital product collaborations (reading journals, curated lists, branded merch) for the right fit.
ctaText: All enquiries welcome. If you think you're a fit — or  if you're not sure — email me, and let's figure it out.
